name: Vidalia Beef Patty
recipeIngredient: 1 thick, lean ground beef patty per person
1 1/2 inch thick slice of Idaho potato per person
1 1/2 inch thick slice of large Vidalia onion per person
recipeInstructions:
1. On a piece of heavily buttered foil, place the beef patty.
2. Top the beef patty with a potato slice.
3. Place an onion slice on top of the potato.
4. Add 2 tablespoons of butter or margarine on top of the onion.
5. Season generously with salt and pepper.
6. Twist the foil together at the top to enclose the package.
7. Transfer the package to an ovenproof dish or baking sheet.
8. Bake at 350°F for about 1 hour and 20 minutes.
Serves 1.
